payload.answer: Architecture preferences captured; two questions remain open.
payload.decision: Record the current architecture stance: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Leave Telegram and cheapest high-performing model as open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity references requiring resolution in this summary.

payload.intent: Capture durable architecture preferences for the Brain memory system and preserve open questions without overcommitting.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should function as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary record.
Slack should be used as a strict memory intake agent.
Telegram may be added later, but this remains unresolved.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance is unresolved.

details: Captured source-of-truth preference for Brain DB.
Captured Slack as strict intake agent.
Preserved Telegram and model-choice items as open questions.

repair_options: If needed, split the open questions into separate tracked tasks.
If a model benchmark exists, attach it before choosing the cheapest acceptable model.
